When a ruthless gang threatens to plunge the frontier into lawlessness, Buck Roberts (Buck Jones), Tim McCall (Tim McCoy), and Sandy Hopkins (Raymond Hatton) ride into action. With six-guns blazing and courage unshaken, the trio takes on outlaws, treachery, and danger at every turn in this thrilling chapter of the Rough Riders series.

programme.title: The Crooked Trail
programme.desc: Jim Blake rescues criminal Hare Talton and Good Samaritan Estaban Solano from dehydration and death and tries to rehabilitate Harve by taking him in as partner in his gold strike.

programme.title: Any Gun Can Play
programme.desc: A gang robs a gold shipment from a train. A so called bounty hunter is sent to track down the robbers and decides to let them lead him to the gold

programme.title: The Trusted Outlaw
programme.desc: Dan Ward, reformed and last member of an outlaw family, meets Molly Clark in a rocky draw near town. Ted Wells, a henchman for Dan's enemy Jim Swain, attempts to shoot Dan but is outdrawn and killed by the latter.
